name: UnionCodingGapRemarkAndCodingGapRemark
title: Union of Coding Gap Remark Codes And Coding Gap Remark Codes

concept.definition: Assessed the gap and acknowledged it is still present.
Assessed the gap and acknowledged it is not present.
Assessed the gap and actions are taken to address the gap.
Assessed the gap and actions will be taken in the future to address the gap.
Gap was shown to the provider but no action was taken to assess the gap.
System did not present the gap to the end user.
System cannot process the gap that was received.
